_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: QuantumMC (BedrockSharp)
author: contact@quantum.org
description: QuantumMC - A Minecraft Bedrock server implementation by BedrockSharp

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt-get update > /dev/null 2>&1
apt-get install -y wget curl > /dev/null 2>&1
mkdir -p /mnt/server/
cd /mnt/server

# Use panel variable or fallback to alpha2
QUANTUMMC_VERSION="${QUANTUMMC_VERSION:-0.0.1-alpha2}"

# Download QuantumMC from BedrockSharp GitHub releases
wget -q -O QuantumMC.dll "https://github.com/BedrockSharp/QuantumMC/releases/download/${QUANTUMMC_VERSION}/QuantumMC.dll"

echo "QuantumMC ${QUANTUMMC_VERSION} downloaded successfully."

variables.name: QuantumMC Version
variables.description: The version of QuantumMC to download. Check https://github.com/BedrockSharp/QuantumMC/releases for available versions.
